sql_array: CREATE TABLE date_test (test_date DATETIME, test_string VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO date_test (test_date, test_string) VALUES (STRINGDATE('2023-01-01'), 'January 1st'), (NULL, 'NULL date'), (STRINGDATE('2500-01-01'), 'Far Future');
SELECT dayname(test_date) AS day_name, monthname(test_date) AS month_name FROM date_test WHERE dayofmonth(test_date) = 1 AND ISIRI(test_string);
SELECT week(test_date), COUNT(*) FROM date_test GROUP BY week(test_date) HAVING week(test_date) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT test_string, dayofyear(test_date), hour(test_date) FROM date_test WHERE hour(test_date) BETWEEN 0 AND 23 AND ISIRI(test_string) ORDER BY dayofyear(test_date) DESC;
SELECT test_string, MIN(second(test_date)) AS min_seconds FROM date_test GROUP BY test_string HAVING min_seconds IS NOT NULL;
SELECT quarter(test_date), timezone(test_date) FROM date_test WHERE test_date IS NOT NULL AND ISIRI(test_string) AND month(test_date) = 1;
SELECT year(test_date) AS year_val, COUNT(*) FROM date_test WHERE test_date > STRINGDATE('2000-01-01') GROUP BY year_val HAVING COUNT(*) BETWEEN 0 AND 5;
SELECT test_string, dayofweek(test_date) as day_week FROM date_test WHERE dayofweek(test_date) IN (1, 7) AND ISIRI(test_string) ORDER BY test_string;
SELECT test_string, MIN(minute(test_date)) AS min_minutes FROM date_test WHERE test_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY test_string HAVING MIN(test_date) IS NOT NULL;
